heading: Behavior
body:
The [$function](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/function) expression runs the specified function
on each document in the stream. The function can take arguments
from the document or from the [args](function-args) array.

The function can return any BSON type, including an array or a
Code type. The returned value is used as the output of the
[$function](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/function) expression.
